scripts.check: bun install --no-summary && bunx turbo run test
scripts.test: [ -n "$TURBO_HASH" ] || { echo 'Use bun run check (via turbo) instead of bun run test directly' >&2; exit 1; } && bun test
scripts.test:hermes: [ -n "$TURBO_HASH" ] || { echo 'Use bun run check (via turbo) instead of bun run test:hermes directly' >&2; exit 1; } && clients/hermes/scripts/test.sh
scripts.typecheck: [ -n "$TURBO_HASH" ] || { echo 'Use bun run check (via turbo) instead of bun run typecheck directly' >&2; exit 1; } && tsc --noEmit
scripts.lint: [ -n "$TURBO_HASH" ] || { echo 'Use bun run check (via turbo) instead of bun run lint directly' >&2; exit 1; } && bunx biome check .
